---
format:
    html:
      echo: false
      page-layout: custom
resources:
  - "content/objects/"
editor: visual
---

```{=html}
<style>
  :root {
    --axes-top: 60px;
    --axes-size: 150px;
    --ui-top: calc(var(--axes-top) + var(--axes-size) + 20px);
    --info-panel-bg: rgba(30, 30, 30, 0.9);
    --info-panel-color: #f0f0f0;
    --info-panel-border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
    --info-panel-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
    --info-panel-scrollbar-track: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    --info-panel-scrollbar-thumb: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
    --info-panel-scrollbar-thumb-hover: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
  }

  body.quarto-light {
    --info-panel-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
    --info-panel-color: #1a1a1a;
    --info-panel-border: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
    --info-panel-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    --info-panel-scrollbar-track: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    --info-panel-scrollbar-thumb: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    --info-panel-scrollbar-thumb-hover: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
  }

  body.quarto-dark {
    --info-panel-bg: rgba(30, 30, 30, 0.9);
    --info-panel-color: #f0f0f0;
    --info-panel-border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
    --info-panel-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
    --info-panel-scrollbar-track: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    --info-panel-scrollbar-thumb: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
    --info-panel-scrollbar-thumb-hover: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
  }

  body, html { 
    margin: 0; 
    padding: 0; 
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  canvas {
    position: fixed !important;
    top: 0 !important;
    left: 0 !important;
    width: 100vw !important;
    height: 100vh !important;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: auto;
  }

  #quarto-header {
    z-index: 10;
  }

  #TOC, .footer {
    display: none !important;
  }

  #quarto-content {
    padding-top: 0 !important; 
    margin: 0 !important;
  }

  /* Panneau d'explication latéral */
  #info-panel {
    position: fixed;
    top: calc(var(--header-height) + 20px);
    left: 20px;
    width: 400px;
    max-height: calc(100vh - 120px);
    background-color: var(--info-panel-bg);
    color: var(--info-panel-color);
    padding: 20px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border: 1px solid var(--info-panel-border);
    box-shadow: var(--info-panel-shadow);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    z-index: 100;
    overflow-y: auto;
    font-family: sans-serif;
  }

  /* Conteneur UI */
  #ui-container {
    position: fixed;
    top: var(--ui-top);
    right: 20px;
    z-index: 200;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 10px;
    background: none;
  }

  .btn {
    background-color: #333;
    color: #f0f0f0;
    padding: 10px 15px;
    border: 1px solid #4da6ff;
    border-radius: 4px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: sans-serif;
    transition: background 0.3s;
  }

  .btn:hover {
    background-color: #4da6ff;
  }

  /* Spinner de chargement */
  #loader {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100vw;
    height: 100vh;
    background-color: #1a1a1a;
    color: white;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    z-index: 1000;
    font-family: sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.5em;
  }

  #info-panel::-webkit-scrollbar {
    width: 8px;
  }
  
  #info-panel::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
    background: var(--info-panel-scrollbar-track);
    border-radius: 4px;
  }
  
  #info-panel::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
    background: var(--info-panel-scrollbar-thumb);
    border-radius: 4px;
  }

  #info-panel::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
    background: var(--info-panel-scrollbar-thumb-hover);
  }

  #info-panel h2 {
    color: #4da6ff;
    margin-top: 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
    padding-bottom: 10px;
    font-size: 1.3em;
  }

  #info-panel h3 {
    color: #8cc3ff;
    font-size: 1.1em;
    margin-top: 15px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
  }

  #info-panel p {
    line-height: 1.5;
    font-size: 0.95em;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }

  #info-panel ul {
    padding-left: 20px;
    margin-top: 5px;
  }

  #info-panel li {
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-size: 0.9em;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }

  /* Rendre le panneau responsive sur mobile */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    #info-panel {
      width: calc(100% - 40px);
      max-height: 40vh;
      bottom: 20px;
      top: auto;
    }
  }
</style>

<div id="loader">Chargement du modèle...</div>

<div id="ui-container">
  <label for="compare-slider" style="color: white; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 0.9em; margin-bottom: 5px;">Comparaison (Brut ↔ Optimisé)</label>
  <input type="range" id="compare-slider" min="0" max="1" step="0.01" value="1" style="width: 100%;">
  <button id="reset-view" class="btn">Réinitialiser la vue</button>
</div>

<div id="info-panel">
  <h2>Inverse Rendering: A Case Study</h2>
  <p>This project documents the transformation of a physical object into a web-ready 3D asset, highlighting the inverse rendering pipeline.</p>

  <h3>1. The Subject: Cyberpunk 2077</h3>
  <p>I digitized a Johnny Silverhand figurine to push the pipeline to its limits. The challenge lay in the mix of materials: while matte clothing textures tracked perfectly, the reflective metallic arm and transparent glasses tested the robustness of the epipolar geometry and point matching.</p>

  <h3>2. Acquisition Pipeline</h3>
  <p>To ensure high-quality reconstruction from 322 images (Samsung S26 Ultra, 6120x8160 px), I maintained a strict workflow:</p>
  <ul>
    <li><strong>Controlled Capture:</strong> Constant focal length via turntable.</li>
    <li><strong>Data Density:</strong> >80% image overlap to guarantee triangulation stability.</li>
    <li><strong>Lighting:</strong> Diffuse interior setup to minimize parasitic reflections and harsh shadows.</li>
  </ul>

  <h3>3. Computational Reconstruction</h3>
  <p>The images were processed using RealityScan, following standard industry algorithms:</p>
  <ul>
    <li><strong>Structure from Motion (SfM):</strong> Estimating camera intrinsics/extrinsics and triangulating a sparse point cloud.</li>
    <li><strong>Multi-View Stereo (MVS):</strong> Pixel-depth inference for a dense point cloud.</li>
    <li><strong>Surface Reconstruction:</strong> Generating the mesh (Poisson algorithm) and re-projecting textures.</li>
  </ul>

  <h3>4. Optimization for Web</h3>
  <p>Raw scans are unusable for real-time applications without rigorous cleanup in <strong>Blender</strong>:</p>
  <ul>
    <li><strong>Cleanup:</strong> Removing non-target geometry (platform base).</li>
    <li><strong>Repair:</strong> Topological hole-filling where algorithms failed on reflective surfaces.</li>
    <li><strong>Decimation:</strong> Reducing polygon count for real-time web performance while preserving visual integrity.</li>
  </ul>

  <h3>5. WebGL Renders</h3>
  <p>The final optimized <strong>.glb</strong> asset is rendered in <strong>Three.js</strong> using a customized lighting environment, orbital controls, and material settings tailored for web display.</p>
</div>
```

```{ojs}
import { my_photogrametry_canvas } from "./content/scripts/photogrametrie.ojs"

my_photogrametry_canvas
```
